name: io.github.caseSHY/aicoreutils
description: JSON-first Coreutils CLI for AI agents. 114 commands with sandbox, dry-run, and MCP support.
longDescription: AICoreUtils is a JSON-first command-line toolkit for LLM agents, inspired by GNU Coreutils. It provides 114 deterministic commands with structured JSON output, semantic exit codes, sandboxing for file safety, dry-run for mutation commands, and zero runtime dependencies. Exposes all commands as MCP tools via a stdio JSON-RPC server.
